package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for repeated_c_json_inside_stream_loop: Gin handlers that call c.JSON(...) or c.PureJSON(...) from inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule334NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule334NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule334NegativeRecord) (Rule334NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario334Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule334NegativeService, input Rule334NegativeRecord) (Rule334NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule334NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
